description: Gold set: each finding should retrieve the listed section ID(s) in top-k. Spans the multi-peril Singapore knowledge base. This is deliverable #4 (test evidence).

cases.finding: Exit blocked by stacked pallets reducing clear width.
Only one fire extinguisher across a large floor area.
Cardboard stored against the electrical distribution board.
Illuminated exit signage present on escape route.
Sprinkler heads obstructed by high-piled stock.
Fire alarm call point not tested in over a year.
Flammable solvents stored without a ventilated cabinet.
Socket outlets not protected by a 30 mA residual current device.
Distribution board circuit breakers overloaded by added circuits.
Exposed metal of equipment not connected to protective earth.
No record of periodic electrical inspection by a licensed electrical worker.
Rotating drive shaft on the conveyor is exposed with no guard.
Mezzanine edge has no guard-rail or fall protection for workers.
Chemicals stored without safety data sheets or segregation.
Gangway obstructed creating a slip and trip hazard.
Basement entrance has no flood barrier below ground level.
Building platform level is below the required flood datum.
Forklift lifting examination certificate expired fourteen months ago.
Pressure vessel operated without a valid examination certificate.
Machine not locked out before maintenance and clearing a blockage.
Hose reel obstructed by stored goods on the warehouse floor.
Fire-rated wall has an unsealed service penetration breaching the compartment.
No accessible main switch to isolate the installation for maintenance.
Socket outlet installed inside a bathroom without suitable IP-rated protection.
Worker entered a tank with no atmosphere test or entry permit.
No hearing protection where machinery noise exceeds 85 dBA.
No documented risk assessment for the work activities on site.
Main switch room and generator located below the flood level.
Scaffold in use with no inspection tag or competent-person check.
